data.title: US Says It Awaits Iran Move on Talks as Hormuz Tension Rises
data.description: The US said it’s waiting for a response from Iran before the warring sides can restart peace talks, with the impasse and worsening tension over the Strait of Hormuz causing energy prices to rise again.
data.keywords: Iran,Donald John Trump,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,Tehran,War,White House,Stocks,Military,Israel,Economic Growth,politics
